name: The Listener Role
description: The person often becomes the one who understands others while hiding their own needs.
risk: being needed but not truly met

name: Withdrawal Under Pressure
description: The person stays agreeable until emotional pressure becomes real, then retreats.
risk: others experience the retreat as sudden or confusing

name: Truth-Teller Dependence
description: The person needs at least one honest observer to turn self-analysis into grounded action.
risk: without outside reflection, insight may become private rumination

name: Admiration Contract
description: The person may unconsciously trade performance for closeness or security.
risk: love and respect become difficult to receive when not performing

name: Private Need Delay
description: Needs are kept private until the internal account has already gone negative.
risk: the relationship receives the invoice before it ever saw the bill

name: Stable But Unseen Partner
description: The relationship may look suitable on the outside, but the person does not feel fully seen inside it.
risk: stability becomes a reason to stay silent instead of a source of safety

name: High Attraction Low Safety
description: Strong attraction may appear where the current relationship cannot hold truth, boredom, or unmet needs.
risk: external attraction becomes an escape route rather than a real choice

name: Cold Conflict Loop
description: Conflict is not resolved directly; it cools down on the surface while the emotional account keeps accumulating debt.
risk: the relationship may break suddenly after looking calm for a long time
